source: E:/AI/skill/三视图.skill (character-ref-sheet) + user: left 50% face, ethnicity, no negative

layout.left: ultra-large facial close-up filling the entire left half (50% of frame width)
layout.right: front / back / side full-body; faces covered by solid black rectangular censor boxes

template_en:
A professional e-commerce fashion reference sheet on neutral gray background. Strict left-right 50/50 split layout composition.

【LEFT SIDE — 50% of the image width — Ultra-Large Facial Close-Up】
The entire left half of the frame (exactly about 50% width) is filled by one ultra-large facial close-up only. Face fills most of this left half. Core emphasis on extremely realistic skin texture: clearly visible pores, subtle skin texture, natural uneven skin tone, and tiny imperfections (such as freckles or moles). Fine peach fuzz on the face. No airbrushing, no plastic-smooth AI-generated look. Natural, sheer makeup. Eyes focused on camera.
Ethnicity / race: {ETHNICITY}.
Character features: {HAIR_STYLE_AND_COLOR}, {FACIAL_FEATURES}, {EARRINGS_AND_NECKLACE}, {HEAD_ACCESSORIES}.

【RIGHT SIDE — 50% of the image width — Full-Body Multi-Angle Views】
The entire right half (about 50% width) shows three full-body standing views: front view, back view, side view.
IMPORTANT: The face area of each full-body figure must be covered with a solid black rectangular censor box, completely hiding all facial features. This is a mandatory privacy requirement for the reference sheet.
1. Posture and temperament: {POSTURE_DESCRIPTION}.
2. Clothing: {CLOTHING_DESCRIPTION}. Footwear: {SHOES_DESCRIPTION}. Holding: {PROPS_OR_EMPTY}.

【Overall Style】
Commercial studio lighting, bright and even illumination with preserved dimensionality. 8K resolution, ultra HD, macro lens details, real photography style, RAW format quality.

posture_options.confident_professional: Confident power stance, one hand on hip, chin slightly raised, commanding presence
posture_options.elegant: Poised and graceful posture, hands gently clasped in front, soft shoulders
posture_options.cool_street: Relaxed swagger, weight on one leg, slightly tilted head, effortless cool
posture_options.cute_playful: Playful energy, one foot slightly forward, bright cheerful expression
posture_options.intellectual: Thoughtful elegance, one hand near chin, contemplative gaze
posture_options.animal: Natural standing pose of {SPECIES}, alert ears, dignified stance

animal_adjustments.left: head close-up filling left 50%, fur texture, eyes, nose detail

missing_info_policy: Infer ethnicity and look from brief/style if missing; mark inferred in zh summary
zh_summary_template: 【三视图】{name}（人种：{ethnicity}）：画面左50%超大面部特写；右50%正面/背面/侧面全身（脸部黑块遮挡）。灰底。
